governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires mapped evidence and real environment verification before reporting complete.
Production changes must use origin/main, deploy_to_macmini.sh, Mac Mini runtime verification, and completion evidence guard.

problem: Mac Mini com.harness.edu-tier3-free was loaded and running hourly, but pending edu_consulting count stayed at 6526 because the high-precision Gemini gate had 0 candidates and the existing rule-skip patterns had no remaining matches.
fix: Rule triage now records candidates outside the curated Tier3 source allowlist as irrelevant skip markers while still excluding candidates that pass the high-precision keep gate. This drains low-quality backlog without deleting raw or filtered signals, and Gemini free-tier remains reserved for curated keep candidates.

verification.name: local syntax and candidate gate tests

remaining_verification: Deploy to Mac Mini, run a bounded free-tier triage batch, confirm pending count decreases, and confirm launchd remains loaded.
